name: Claim denied saying my fall-related illness was idiopathic in Farmington?
description: Appeal if work aggravated; hard floor proof.[2]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied saying my fall-related illness was idiopathic in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal if work aggravated; hard floor proof.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appealable if work conditions worsened injury, like hard floors amplifying idiopathic fall.[2] Utah courts require actual aggravation proof.[2] Key factors: floor hardness evidence, medical worsening link. Remand common; bolster with experts. Overturn possible.
